privileged_info_summary: Completed PI audit for dbeaver_env chinook_blob_management task. Verified that the task uses the standard synthetic Chinook SQLite sample database at the expected path. All expected metadata parameters, including the source image path, export path, target employee ID (1 for Andrew Adams), and issue date exactly match the explicit instructions, setup scripts, and export verification scripts.
